scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (payments, refunds, customers, locations); Square is read-only in legacy (no reverse-ETL write surface) and the full Square surface (orders, catalog, invoices, team members, disputes, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B
